name.full: ITSM Operations Agent - ITIL V4 and NIST 800-53 IT Service Management

description.short: Full ITSM operations: incidents, problems, changes, SLAs, knowledge, assets
description.full: ITSM Operations agent provides full IT Service Management across incident management, problem management, change enablement, SLA compliance, knowledge base, asset management, and CMDB intelligence - all grounded in ITIL V4 and NIST 800-53, rendered as rich widgets inside M365 Copilot.
